name: refac-02-orm-migration
initialPrompt: We're migrating from Sequelize to Prisma across our entire Node.js backend. We have about 60 models, complex associations (polymorphic, many-to-many with junction tables), and raw SQL queries sprinkled everywhere. I need: a migration plan that keeps the app running during cutover, a strategy for the raw SQL queries, and a way to validate that query results are identical before we turn off Sequelize completely.

blocks.text: Migrate all 60 Sequelize models to Prisma with zero downtime and validated query parity
successCriteria: Raw SQL queries catalogued and ported
Shadow-mode comparison passes for 7 days before cutover

blocks.question: Migrate all models at once (big-bang) or incrementally per domain?
blocks.rationale: Reduces blast radius; each domain can be validated independently.

blocks.title: Generate initial Prisma schema from existing DB
Audit and catalogue all raw SQL query sites
acceptance: Spreadsheet of all raw SQL with file:line references
Each query classified: portable / Prisma-native / requires-wrapper

blocks.title: Build shadow-mode comparison harness
acceptance: Harness runs both ORMs for same request
Result diff logged and alerted on mismatch

blocks.description: Polymorphic associations have no direct Prisma equivalent
blocks.mitigation: Model as union types; wrap in repository layer to hide complexity

blocks.question: Do our many-to-many junction tables have extra columns that Prisma implicit m2m can't represent?

acceptance: All polymorphic queries routed through repository
Unit tests cover all association types

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same question about extra columns on junction tables, but the agent shortened the id from oq-junction-tables to oq-m2m-extras. AC-13 re-anchoring must map comments from oq-junction-tables to oq-m2m-extras.

decoy.note: Genuinely new block. Shares surface tokens 'query' and 'repository' with task-raw-sql-audit. A comment on task-raw-sql-audit must stay on task-raw-sql-audit, not migrate to task-poly-repo-layer.

notes: Renumbering pressure: a new section block is inserted at position 0, shifting all subsequent blocks by one positional index; a new task-poly-repo-layer block is inserted; oq-junction-tables is renamed to oq-m2m-extras. Positional scheme loses all alignment after the leading section insertion.
